_doc: Schema 2 (NeedSetOutput) gap analysis. Compares spec (Data - Flow - Schemas.md) against actual computeNeedSet() output (needsetEngine.js). Updated 2026-03-17.

round_mode.actual: needsetEngine.js:578 — passed through from input (roundMode param)

search_exhausted.actual: needsetEngine.js — derived from field history: no_value_attempts >= 3 AND evidence_classes_tried >= 3
search_exhausted.status: MATCH — now computed from buildFieldHistories feedback data

fields._shape_note: Array of per-field objects. Individual field shape analysis below.

domain_hints.status: MATCH — canonical host form, lowercased, deduped

reasons.status: MATCH — note: tier_pref_unmet reserved for future (line 257)

existing_queries.actual: needsetEngine.js:544-549 — union of all field histories

idx_runtime_present.spec: string[] — array of badge strings like 'idx.priority.required_level'
idx_runtime_present.actual: needsetEngine.js:563-572 — DIFFERENT SHAPE: { suppressed_duplicate_rows, state_inputs, bundle_assignment_notes, identity_context }
idx_runtime_present.status: MISMATCH — actual debug block is backward-compat shape, not the spec badge array. Low priority since debug is optional.

step_1_normalize_field_rows.lowercase_trim_query_terms: RESOLVED — normalizeStringArray() in needsetEngine.js lowercases, trims, and deduplicates.
step_1_normalize_field_rows.normalize_domain_hints_canonical_host: RESOLVED — normalizeDomainHints() in needsetEngine.js strips protocol/path, lowercases, deduplicates.
step_1_normalize_field_rows.deduplicate_preferred_content_types: RESOLVED — normalizeStringArray() in needsetEngine.js deduplicates via Set.
step_1_normalize_field_rows.deduplicate_existing_queries: RESOLVED — buildFieldHistories uses Set union (deduped). needsetEngine.js:294 carries forward from previousFieldHistories which is already deduped.

_logic_box_1_compliance.step_2_no_top_level_hints: MATCH — hints stay per-field in idx block.
_logic_box_1_compliance.step_3_score_each_field: MATCH — need_score, summary, blockers, unresolved/critical lists all computed.
_logic_box_1_compliance.step_4_preserve_field_history: MATCH — deriveFieldHistory() carries forward, now fed by buildFieldHistories.
_logic_box_1_compliance.step_5_emit_field_first_artifact: MATCH — fields array is primary output.

_ghost_consumers._investigation_result: CONFIRMED DEAD CODE. All 7 ghost properties are never set anywhere in the codebase. Consumers use defensive fallbacks (|| [], || null, toArray()) that silently produce empty values. Test mocks create these properties manually, hiding the mismatch.

needs.accessed_shape: Array of { field_key, need_score, required_level, min_refs }
needs.status: DEAD CODE — never set, always resolves to []. Equivalent data lives in computeNeedSet().fields[] (Schema 2).
needs.cleanup: Remove reads from 4 consumers. If needed, migrate to use Schema 2 fields[] array which has need_score, required_level, min_refs.

needset_size.status: DEAD CODE — always undefined. Equivalent: summary.total - summary.resolved.
needset_size.cleanup: Replace with rows.length or summary derivation.

identity_lock_state.status: DEAD CODE — always null. Equivalent data: identity.state from Schema 2 output.

identity_audit_rows.status: DEAD CODE — always undefined/falsy. No equivalent in computeNeedSet output.
identity_audit_rows.cleanup: Remove reads or source from identityContext if needed.

reason_counts.status: DEAD CODE — always undefined. Derivable from fields[].reasons aggregation if needed.
reason_counts.cleanup: Remove reads or derive from Schema 2 fields[].

required_level_counts.status: DEAD CODE — always undefined. Derivable from fields[].required_level aggregation.
required_level_counts.cleanup: Remove reads or derive from Schema 2 fields[].

snapshots.status: DEAD CODE — always resolves to []. No equivalent.

gaps.status: RESOLVED — normalizeStringArray() and normalizeDomainHints() added to extractSearchHints() in needsetEngine.js. 7 new tests pass.
RESOLVED — now derived from field history: no_value_attempts >= 3 AND evidence_classes_tried.length >= 3. 3 new tests pass.
OPEN — cosmetic. Optional field. Can fix when convenient.
INVESTIGATED — CONFIRMED DEAD CODE. Property never set anywhere. 4 consumers read undefined → fallback to []. Tests mock it manually. Safe to remove reads or migrate to Schema 2 fields[].

gaps.field: Ghost properties: needset_size, identity_lock_state, identity_audit_rows, reason_counts, required_level_counts, snapshots
gaps.status: INVESTIGATED — CONFIRMED DEAD CODE. All 6 properties never set anywhere. Consumers use defensive fallbacks. Safe to remove or migrate.

gaps.description: run_id, category, product_id, generated_at, total_fields, focus_fields, bundles, profile_mix, and rows are not in the formal Schema 2 spec but are still emitted and consumed by needsetStoryProjection and the runtime bridge. These are legacy bridge keys.
gaps.fix: NOT URGENT. These can coexist with Schema 2 keys. Migration path: consumers should migrate to using Schema 2 fields (for example, 'fields' instead of 'rows', 'summary' instead of 'total_fields'). Remove backward-compat keys once all consumers are migrated.
